lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: The campus is quite peaceful today, don't you think?

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Oh, a message from Kiko? Let me see...

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Ah, they're ready for the meeting! Thank you for letting me know.

lines.speaker: Sekyu
lines.text: Thanks again for the help. I'll be meeting with Kiko shortly.
